mapper.select: SELECT r.code FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT DISTINCT p.code FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id JOIN sys_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT code FROM sys_permission WHERE type = 'ACTION'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ur.user_id) FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = ur.user_id WHERE r.code = #{roleCode} AND u.status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ur.user_id) FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE r.code = #{roleCode}
